svg.title: Humanoid Robotics Textbook — RAG Architecture
svg.desc: Architecture diagram showing the complete system design of the Humanoid Robotics Textbook with embedded RAG AI Tutor, from user interaction through vector search to AI response generation.
svg.text: 6 modules • 24+ weeks • live RAG AI tutor

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does a user interact with the book?')
sendPrompt('How does text selection work?')
sendPrompt('How does the user ask questions?')
sendPrompt('What is Docusaurus and how is it used here?')
sendPrompt('What modules does the book contain?')
sendPrompt('How is the AI tutor embedded in the book?')
sendPrompt('What does the FastAPI backend do?')
sendPrompt('What is the OpenAI Agents SDK used for?')
sendPrompt('How does query embedding work?')
sendPrompt('How does Qdrant vector search work?')
sendPrompt('How does context retrieval work?')
sendPrompt('What is stored in Qdrant Cloud?')
sendPrompt('What is stored in Neon PostgreSQL?')
sendPrompt('How is book content indexed?')
sendPrompt('How does LLM response generation work?')
sendPrompt('How is the answer shown to the reader?')
sendPrompt('How is the book deployed on Vercel?')
sendPrompt('What is GitHub Pages used for?')
sendPrompt('What is Claude Code used for?')
sendPrompt('What is Spec-Kit Plus?')
